_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: sphere formation was significantly inhibited in cells treated with MLN8237 in comparison to the vehicle alone treated cells (166 to 29 spheres in the DMSO and MLN8237 treated cells, respectively. p<0.05)
details: MLN8237 at IC-50 concentrations inhibited sphere formation (166 to 29 spheres in DMSO vs MLN8237 treated cells, p<0.05) and significantly reduced self-renewal capacity
